title: 3956 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Update|''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]''}}
{{Year
|image=[[File:ShadowsandLight2.jpg]]
|galacticera=[[Old Sith Wars]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>
|conflict=*[[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="KotORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
*[[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>
*[[Bek–Vulkar gang war]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>
*[[Sith Civil War]]<ref name="KotORCG" />
|emperor=*[[Darth Malak]] (of his [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Master's Sith Empire]])<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*[[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]]
|events=*Reemergence of [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" /><ref name="KotORCG" />
*[[Destruction of Taris|Destruction]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" /><ref name="KotORCG" />
*Conclusion of the [[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" /><ref name="KotORCG" />
*Death of [[Darth Malak]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" /><ref name="KotORCG" />
*Start of the [[Sith Civil War]]<ref name="KotORCG" />
|eras=[[Old Republic era]]}}
{{Quote|We ''will'' defeat Malak and save the Republic from the Sith threat once and for all!|Juhani on the [[Temple of the Ancients]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
The year '''3956 before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] (BBY)''', also known as '''303 before the [[Treaty of Coruscant]] (BTC)''', was a span of time marked by the continued conflict and conclusion of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Birthed [[3959 BBY|three years earlier]] from the reemergence of former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] war heroes [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak|Malak]] as [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lords]]. The new dark lords, in conjunction with those in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] who had been seduced by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], invaded [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and war broke out. By 3956 BBY, however, [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Revan had been [[Capture of Darth Revan|captured]] by a Jedi strike team led by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bastila Shan]]. <!-- need to expand further -->

==Proem==
{{Quote|Three years ago, Revan and Malak returned at the head of a massive invasion fleet. Revan had assumed the title of Sith Lord; the hero had become a conqueror.|[[Dorak]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
A galaxy-wide conflict known as the [[Mandalorian Wars]] ended in [[3960 BBY]]<ref name="NEC" /><ref name="Chronicles">{{LucasArts|url=games/swkotor_sithlords|text=''Chronicles of the Old Republic''|int=Chronicles of the Old Republic}}</ref> when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] known as [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and his apprentice [[Darth Malak|Malak]] joined the war effort, turning the tide of the war. The war heroes had retreated into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] along with much of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] under the guise of seeking out the remaining [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] clans. In the Unknown Regions, however, the Jedi and those who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] became corrupted under the leading of Revan and Malak. The two Jedi fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and became [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]], called [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Revan and Darth Malak.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

During their time stationed outside the boundaries of Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]], Revan and Malak traveled throughout Republic collecting data from [[Star Map]]s and eventually gained access to the [[Star Forge]], an ancient manufacturing facility in the [[Lehon system]]. With the power of the Star Forge, the dark lords amassed a large fleet and other matériel—such as [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and weaponry. Under the banner of a [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] the former war heroes turned on the Republic and invaded.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Darth Revan's strategy was originally to capture key Republic [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and facilities, leaving infrastructure intact.<ref name="TSL">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref> By [[3957 BBY]], battlefronts had opened in various places across the galaxy.<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> At [[Foerost/Legends|Foerost]],<ref name="KotORCG" /> the Republic navy was decimated.<ref name="EA" /> Key locations along hyperspace routes such as [[Roche asteroid field|Roche]], [[Axxila/Legends|Axxila]], [[Allanteen VI/Legends|Allanteen Six]], and [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] were conquered and held by the Sith Empire.<ref name="EA" /> [[Czerka 431]], [[AB-343]],<ref name="Wizards1">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Czerka431|text=Czerka 431|int=Czerka 431 (scenario)}}</ref><ref name="Wizards2">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/PermanentDemotion|text=Permanent Demotion|int=Permanent Demotion}}</ref> [[Telos IV]],<ref name="TSL" /><ref name="KotORCG" /> [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]], [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]],<ref name="KotORCG" /> [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]], and [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] were other flashpoints.<ref name="EA" /> In that year, however, a Jedi strike team was dispatched to [[Capture of Darth Revan|capture]] Darth Revan. The strike team, lead by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bastila Shan]] captured Revan, in part due to betrayal by Darth Malak, and brought him before the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. The Jedi wiped Revan's memory, providing him with a new identity and posted him as a soldier under the command of Shan.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

==The galaxy in 3956 BBY==
===Jedi Civil War===
====Pursuit of Bastila Shan====
{{Quote|The search for Bastila is taking too long. We cannot risk her escaping Taris. Destroy the entire planet.|Darth Malak, to Admiral Karath, ordering the [[destruction of Taris]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
{{SeeAlso|Attack on the Endar Spire{{!}}Attack on the ''Endar Spire''|Rescue of Bastila Shan|Destruction of Taris}}
Having usurped the position of head of the Sith Empire from Revan, Malak launched a search of the Jedi Knight Bastila Shan. Malak feared her [[Force power/Legends|ability]] of [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] power that could sway the morale of those fighting in a battle enough to provide the Republic an advantage. Malak, aboard the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']], tracked Shan and her flagship the ''[[Endar Spire]]'' to the [[Taris system/Legends|Taris system]]. Above the planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], the Sith [[Attack on the Endar Spire|attacked the ''Endar Spire'']]. During the attack, Shan boarded an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] which crashed onto the planet surface. At the same time, however, Revan—who was unawares regarding his original identity—was stationed on the vessel under Shan's command. Together with cabinmate [[Trask Ulgo]], he fought through the boarding party of [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] to reach the bridge. Seeing that Shan had evacuated, the pair sought a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] named [[Carth Onasi]], who was tracking them through the ''Endar Spire''{{'s}} [[Life support/Legends|life support]] systems. Revan and Ulgo encountered Malak's new apprentice, [[Darth Bandon]], on the way. Ulgo engaged the Bandon in combat while Revan escaped. Ulgo's sacrifice gave Revan enough time to meet up with Onasi and board the final remaining escape pod.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

{{GameLSmechanics}}
After crashing on Taris, Onasi dragged Revan from the wreckage and took refuge in an [[Upper City|abandoned Upper City apartment]]. Inside the apartment, the pair devised a plan to [[Rescue of Bastila Shan|rescue]] the Jedi and flee the planet. All the while, Darth Malak refused to allow Shan to escape his grasp. He ordered a quarantine of the planet, blockading any route to and from Taris. On the surface, however, Revan and Onasi eventually traveled into the area known as the [[Lower City]]. The pair made contact with the leader of the [[Hidden Beks]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]], [[Gadon Thek]]. Through Thek, the Republic soldiers were informed that Shan had been captured by the rival swoop gang, the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]]. Their leader, [[Brejik]], was holding Shan [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]] and planned to offer her as the prize for the [[Tarisian Season Opener]], the first major [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop race]] of the season.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Thek and Revan brokered a deal in which he and Onasi would retrieve a [[prototype accelerator]] that the Vulkars had stolen in exchange for the opportunity to take part in the race. Revan and Onasi teamed up with [[Mission Vao]], a young [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]], in the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]], and the trio helped to rescue Vao's [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] friend [[Zaalbar]] from [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] before advancing deep into the [[Undercity sewers]]. Using the sewers as access, the team began their [[Raid on the Vulkar Base|incursion]] into the [[Black Vulkar Base|Vulkar Base]]. After a [[Lightfight|firefight]], the party successfully secured the prototype accelerator. True to his word, Thek permitted Revan to compete in the Season Opener. After Revan won the race, Brejik balked at his posted prize and, along with his comrades, initiated a brawl. Shan freed herself during the skirmish and, together with Revan, defeated Brejik and the other Vulkars.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Having rescued Bastila Shan, Revan and his team needed to escape Taris. While the Republic-sided team had been searching for the Jedi, the Sith were searching the Jedi as well, although unsuccessfully. Furious with the lack of progress, Malak ordered the Sith fleet to begin preparations for an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] in an attempt to kill the Jedi. At the same time, Revan was approached by [[Canderous Ordo]] with a plan to break through the blockade. Ordo suggested that Revan steal the blockade codes from the [[Tarisian military base|Sith Military Base]], and then Ordo would provide a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to leave the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Revan agreed, and acquired [[T3-M4]] from [[Janice Nall]] to facilitate the infiltration. Revan broke into the base and successfully stole the launch codes after a duel with the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Sith Governor]]. Having acquired the codes, Ordo brought Revan to the [[Davik Kang's estate|estate]] of [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Davik Kang]], hoping to steal his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''. As the team was about to commandeer the ship, Darth Malak ordered the Sith fleet to [[Destruction of Taris|open fire]] upon the surface of Taris. This prompted Kang and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Calo Nord]] to arrive at the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] at the same moment of Revan and Ordo. Killing Kang in a scuffle, the pair stole the ship as Nord was buried by falling rubble.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Carth Onasi piloted the ''Ebon Hawk'' away from the planet surface with Revan and his team aboard. All the while, the urban surface of Taris was being reduced to rubble. [[Sith fighter]]s were dispatched to attack the freighter as it was seen fleeing the planet. The fighters were destroyed by Revan as the ''Ebon Hawk'' entered hyperspace while the planet was being destroyed.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

====Revan's commission====
{{Quote|You must not fail in your mission. Find the Star Maps that lead to the Star Forge. This is the only way to stop Malak and his Sith followers. You and Bastila are the galaxy's last, desperate hope.|[[Vandar Tokare]]'s commission to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] following the former Dark Lord's redemption|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
Following the escape from Taris, Revan and his companions traveled to the planet of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] so Bastila Shan could speak with the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. Having landed at the [[Jedi Enclave]] proper, Shan spoke to the council members regarding the awakening of the Force within Revan. The former Sith Lord had been experiencing [[Force vision/Legends|visions]] through the Force and the development concerned Shan. At the suggestion of the Jedi Council, Revan underwent training in the ways of the Jedi. Still unaware of his history as a former Force-wielder, he quickly relearned many skills and feats that he had previously mastered. As part of his training, Revan was asked to cleanse a dark taint which had infiltrated an [[Ancient Grove|ancient grove]] near the Enclave. There, he encountered [[Juhani]], a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who had fallen to the dark side after believing she had killed her [[Quatra|master]] in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]]. After sparing and conversing with Revan, Juhani was redeemed and returned to the enclave. She was later assigned to join Revan's crew.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Succeeding in cleansing the grove, Revan was tasked with searching ancient [[Rakatan ruins (Dantooine)|ruins]] near the Enclave from where another Jedi named [[Nemo]] had not returned. The ruins were discovered to be far older than the Republic itself and housed an ancient [[Star Map]]. After conversing with an [[Rakatan guardian droid|ancient droid]] inside the ruins, Revan learned some limited information regarding the [[Star Forge]]. Reporting his findings to the Jedi Council, the masters charged Revan and his crew to embark on a quest for the Star Forge. All the while, Darth Malak had grown displeased with the escape of Bastila Shan from his grasp. The bounty hunter Calo Nord had survived the bombardment and made his way to the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']] to meet the dark lord. There, Nord revealed Shan's escape with the aid of Republic soldiers and offered his services to track them down. Agreeing to Nord's price, Malak dispatched the bounty hunter to pursue the escapees across the galaxy.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

====In pursuit of the Star Forge====
{{K1order}}
{{Quote|You're a neophyte Padawan who's been saddled with the responsibility of tracking down these Star Maps. Why? That's not normal!|[[Carth Onasi]]|audio=CarthSuspicious.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
{{SeeAlso|Rebellion on Kashyyyk/Legends|Raid on the Sith Embassy|Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)}}
Upon leaving Dantooine, Revan's crew consisted of Carth Onasi, Bastila Shan, Mission Vao, Zaalbar, T3-M4, Canderous Ordo, and Juhani. The crew, executing the commission given to them by the Council, began to visit the places shown on the Star Map.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" /> The first destination was the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Order">For the purpose of simplicity, the planets are being treated in the order of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], and [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] prior to visiting [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]]. The order can change based upon gameplay, but this order is stated in the revelation vision Revan receives aboard the ''Leviathan'' regardless of the order the player visits the planet and is confirmed in the strategy guide published by Prima.</ref><ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> There, the ''Ebon Hawk'' landed at the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]–controlled mining colony of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]]. Revan was introduced to the struggle between the mining teams of the Czerka Corporation and the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] when the local [[Unidentified Czerka Corporation protocol officer|protocol officer]] asked Revan to intervene in the conflict by eliminating the local tribe. After acquiring the [[HK-47]] droid from [[Yuka Laka]] for translation purposes, Revan peacefully resolved the conflict by giving providing the [[Sand People chieftain|local chieftain]] [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]] in exchange for limiting attacks on the miners. In the process, Revan was offered a chance to hunt a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]] by [[Komad Fortuna]]. Accepting, the pair slew the large creature. The cave was revealed to be more [[Rakatan Ruins (Tatooine)|ancient ruins]] which contained a Star Map.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" /> Before leaving Tatooine, however, Revan encountered the bounty hunter Calo Nord.<ref name="Calo-Bandon">Bounty hunter Calo Nord appears after the second Star Map is found in gameplay regardless of the order the planets are visited. Similarly, Darth Bandon appears in gameplay after the fourth Star Map is found. As a result, it is possible for Nord or Bandon to appear on Tatooine, Manaan, or Kashyyyk depending upon the player's choice of travel. Because it is believed to be [[canon]] that Tatooine was visited second, Nord would then appear on Tatooine. Similarly, Darth Bandon would then appear on Manaan.</ref> Nord had tracked the ''Ebon Hawk'' crew to the ruins outside Anchorhead and set an ambush for them with the help of other mercenaries. Nevertheless, Revan and his team dispatched with the bounty hunters and proceeded with his crew to the planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to search for another Star Map.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

The ''Ebon Hawk'' landed on Kashyyyk in the [[Czerka Landing Port|Czerka-controlled spaceport]] near the tree-level city of [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]]. There, Revan and his crew were introduced to the Wookiee [[Slavery/Legends|slave]]-trade that Czerka had imposed upon natives with the help of local [[Chief/Legends|chieftain]] and brother of Zaalbar, [[Chuundar]]. Hunting for the planet's Star Map, Revan and his team requested audience with the chieftain so they could search the planet's surface. Chuundar granted the explorer access to the surface, called the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]], under the condition that he dispose of an expelled Wookiee. Zaalbar, however, was required to remain on Rwookrrorro. When Revan began exploring the Shadowlands, however, he encountered former Jedi [[Jolee Bindo]], who agreed to help Revan during his search of the Shadowlands. Eventually the team encountered the expelled Wookiee, who was none other than [[Freyyr]], former chieftain and father of Chuundar and Zaalbar. Instead of eliminating the deposed leader, Revan retrieved a [[Bacca's Ceremonial Blade|Wookiee relic]] for Freyyr so he could challenge his son who had usurped power. The team then continued to search deeper into the Shadowlands, ultimately discovering an [[Builder Forge|ancient computer]] with a Star Map attached. After acquiring access to the Map, Revan and his team returned to the Rwookrrorro village. All the while, Freyyr had returned to the village to challenge his son for the true title of chieftain. A skirmish ensued when Revan and his team arrived, siding with Freyyr. After defeating Chuundar and his allies in the chieftain's quarters, an [[Rebellion on Kashyyyk/Legends|uprising]] occurred against the Czerka slavers on the planet.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Following Kashyyyk, Revan and his team visited the oceanic planet of Manaan, landing at the only above-water settlement known as [[Ahto City]]. There, the team began the hunt for the fourth Star Map. Through a Force vision, Revan and Shan agreed that the Map was in an underwater location. Contacting representatives in the [[Republic Embassy (Manaan)|Republic Embassy]], Revan made arrangements to use a [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]] to reach the ocean floor at the Republic's [[Hrakert Station]], a harvesting facility of the healing agent [[Kolto/Legends|kolto]] in the [[Hrakert Rift]]. In exchange for this, Revan was charged with [[Raid on the Sith Embassy|retrieving data]] from a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] which had been stolen by Sith agents on Manaan. Infiltrating the [[Sith Embassy]], Revan and his team faced numerous [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]], [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. They were able to recover the data, however, and also stumbled upon a plot to indoctrinate young [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] youth to join the Sith cause against the neutrality policy of the Selkath society. Revan discovered that one of the youth, [[Galas (Selkath)|Galas]], had been tortured and killed in the process. Revealing this to the other youth and to the Ahto City authorities prevented the Sith scheme from furthering.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

Having retrieved the stolen data for the Republic, Revan traveled to Hrakert Station. There, he discovered that the Selkath workers had been driven insane and killed the Republic officials. The source of their insanity was traced to the [[Progenitor]], a large [[Firaxan shark/Legends|firaxan shark]] who lived within the rift. The Progenitor, believed by the Selkath to be the guardian of the kolto and the mother of their species, had unleashed a cry which drove the nearby Selkath insane. At the same time, Revan discovered the Star Map in the rift, but was unable to access it due to the large firaxan shark's actions. To appease the Progenitor, Revan needed to destroy the portion of Hrakert Station which was imposing into the rift for kolto harvesting. Overloading the chemicals, a chain reaction destroyed part of the station and the Progenitor eased. With the large firaxan shark appeased, Revan was able to easily access the Star Map in the rift.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

====Confronting the past====
{{Quote|You cannot hide from what you once were, Revan! Recognize that you were once the Dark Lord - and know that I have taken your place!|Darth Malak to his old Master|audio=MalakReveal.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
*[[Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)|Attack on Dantooine]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*[[Skirmish aboard the Leviathan|Skirmish aboard the ''Leviathan'']]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*[[Skirmish on Korriban]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

====End of the war====
{{Quote|Once again, we shall face each other in single combat, and the victor will decide the fate of the galaxy.|[[Darth Malak]] to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] during the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]]|audio=MalakFateofTheGalaxy.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
*[[Battle of Rakata Prime]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*The reformed [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] defeats his former apprentice [[Darth Malak]] aboard the Star Forge.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*The Star Forge is destroyed.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*The [[Jedi Civil War]] ends with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] as victors.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
{{Endgame}}

===Kanz Disorders===
*Still ongoing in the [[Kanz sector/Legends|Kanz sector]]<ref name="NEC" />
*[[Myrialites]] still had control
*Republic occupied with the Jedi Civil War<ref name="NEC" />

===Elsewhere===
*[[Atris]] begins collecting [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]] and bringing them to Telos IV.<ref name="JvS">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

==Impact==
{{Quote|The Jedi Civil War brought much suffering to the galaxy, and the forces that Malak and Revan amassed against us seemed limitless. Many worlds were destroyed, trade routes disrupted, and the Republic fleet was almost decimated. While it is said that Revan and several Republic heroes and Jedi defeated Malak, in many ways Malak had already won.|Mical|<ref name="TSL" />}}
{{SeeAlso|Sith Civil War|3955 BBY}}

{{GameLSmechanics}}
On the one hand, the conclusion of the Jedi Civil War in 3956 BBY brought a temporary peace to the Republic which had been reeling from the effects of the war. Numerous planets had been laid waste and trade was disrupted throughout the Republic. Even five years after the war ended refugees were still inhabiting places such as [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] and the Republic economy was still on the brink of collapse. Furthermore, the military which had fought the Sith Empire was in ruins and fatigued.<ref name="TSL" />

On the other hand, however, the defeated Sith Empire was left decimated. Those that remained factioned into smaller groups which made war against each other, starting the [[Sith Civil War]].<ref name="TSL" /> [[3954 BBY|Two years later]], [[Kreia|Darth Traya]], [[Darth Nihilus]], and [[Darth Sion]] began their rise to power and reunited the remnants of Revan's former empire. Their rise to power would lead to the [[First Jedi Purge]] and the return of the [[Meetra Surik|exiled Jedi]].<ref name="TSL" /><ref name="KotORCG" />
{{Endgame}}

In the Kanz sector, the lack of Republic intervention enabled the conflict to continue.<ref name="NEC" />
*Continued for almost 300 more years<ref name="NEC" /><ref name="EC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref>
*Conflict caused development of the Lorrdian kinetic communication<ref name="DSPL">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20090531/index.html?page=1|text=Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd: A Hyperspace Exclusive|int=Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd}}</ref>

</div><br clear="all" />

===Births===
*[[T3-M4]]; manufactured on Taris by [[Janice Nall]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

===Deaths===
{{Quote|Im…impossible. I…I cannot be beaten. I am the Dark Lord of the Sith.|Darth Malak|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
{{GameLSmechanics}}
<div style="float:left; width:48%;">
*[[Trask Ulgo]], a [[Unidentified Dark Jedi (Endar Spire)|Dark Jedi]], and a [[Unidentified Jedi Master (Endar Spire)|Jedi Master]] on the ''[[Endar Spire]]''<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

*On Taris
